name: mcp-apps-starter-kit
description: 5 personal MCP Apps components for Claude Desktop — budgets, comparisons, trips, workouts, decisions

scripts.build:views: VITE_VIEW=budget vite build && VITE_VIEW=comparison vite build && VITE_VIEW=trip-explorer vite build && VITE_VIEW=trip-planner vite build && VITE_VIEW=workout-plan vite build && VITE_VIEW=decision-matrix vite build
scripts.build: rm -rf dist-views && npm run build:views && npm run build:server
